prompt: Create a bold anime streetwear poster on a clean white background featuring a single anthropomorphic black dragon character in a three-quarter upper-body pose, leaning forward with hands in the hoodie pockets and a confident snarling grin. The dragon has dark charcoal scales, glowing red lava-like crack patterns across the face, neck, tail, and horns, sharp angular red eyes, white fangs, tall pointed ears, two long red-and-black horns, a spiky red mane, and a long curved tail with a red spear-shaped tip entering from the left. Dress the character in a glossy oversized crimson red zip-up hoodie with the hood up, white drawstrings, heavy folds, a front pocket, and black technical cargo pants; show exactly 4 visible clothing markings: a circular black-and-white emblem patch on the upper sleeve, a black rectangular sleeve patch with distorted white lettering, a small triangular chest logo, and a small white chest wordmark. Add dynamic red paint-splatter strokes around the character, especially one large splash on the right and smaller droplets near the left horn area. At the top, design a magazine-cover style typographic layout with one huge bold condensed red headline reading HAROS MRNG, one small black uppercase line above it with intentionally imperfect pseudo-text, one small black subheading block on the upper left reading STRENH BLACK with a second smaller garbled line below, and a black issue number 12 on the upper right. Use high-contrast cel-shaded anime rendering, sharp black outlines, dramatic red highlights, glossy fabric reflections, clean poster composition, and a modern character-design magazine aesthetic.
